name: PATENT_COUNT_BY_ASSIGNEE_AND_TARGET
description: Count patents for one assignee involving one target in any pair.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target {symbol:$target}) RETURN a.name AS assignee, t.symbol AS target, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count LIMIT 1;
